sql:
WITH TicketData AS (
            SELECT
                T.traffic_type,
                T.json_key,
                T.normal_traffic_ratio,
                T.tcp_syn_flooding_ratio,
                T.land_attack_ratio,
                T.ping_of_death_ratio,
                T.udp_flooding_ratio,
                CAST(T.json_key AS BIGINT) start_key,
                H.row_cnt,        
                T.TICKET_ID
            FROM RCA.TB_RCA_NTT_TICKET_DETAIL_INFO T
            INNER JOIN nia.tb_linkage_hist H ON
                H.key_name = 'aiIpSdnSflowKey'
                AND H.file_name = CONCAT('ipSdnSflow_', CAST(T.json_key AS TEXT), '.json')
            WHERE T.TICKET_ID = 'NTT_SIMULATION'
        ),
        TimeRange AS (
            SELECT 
                MIN(collect_timestamp) as oldest_timestamp, 
                MAX(collect_timestamp) as latest_timestamp
            FROM rca.tb_sflow_collect_hist
            WHERE COLLECT_SEQ   <=   (SELECT start_key FROM TicketData)
            AND COLLECT_SEQ   >=   ((SELECT start_key FROM TicketData) - (SELECT row_cnt FROM TicketData))
        )
        SELECT 
            t.*, 
            r.oldest_timestamp, 
            r.latest_timestamp 
        FROM TicketData t, TimeRange r
        limit 1
